title: Calicut University Time Table 2026 Out - Download April 2026 Schedule

detail.title: Calicut University Time Table 2026 Out - Download April 2026 Schedule
detail.short_info: Calicut University Time Table 2026 released for April exams. Check M.Sc, MBA, B.B.A. and Other Courses supplementary & improvement schedules, exam dates, and download PDF at uoc.ac.in.

sections.heading: Calicut University Time Table 2026 Out - Download April 2026 Schedule

content.text: Calicut University has officially released the Calicut University Time Table 2026 for various April 2026 examinations. The schedules are now available for Supplementary and Improvement examinations of multiple PG and UG programmes for University Teaching Departments.
Students can download the respective time tables from the official examination portal. Most examinations are scheduled to begin from 5 May 2026 onwards.
Visit Official Calicut University Time Table Page

links.text: Visit Official Calicut University Time Table Page

content.text: Calicut University has published the April 2026 examination time tables for several postgraduate and undergraduate courses. These include Supplementary and Improvement examinations for candidates of University Teaching Departments.

Calicut University Time Table 2026 covers various semester examinations under CCSS-PG and other schemes. The university has released multiple time tables for April 2026 exams, mainly for supplementary and improvement categories.

sections.heading: Calicut University Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: Calicut University has released multiple time tables for April 2026 examinations. Below is the list of recently published schedules for different postgraduate and law programmes under various admissions.

sections.heading: How to Download Calicut University Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can download the Calicut University Time Table 2026 quickly by following the steps given below.

items: Visit the official examination portal of Calicut University at pareekshabhavan.uoc.ac.in.
Click on the Timetable section under Examination menu.
Locate the April 2026 time table for your specific course and semester.
Click on the desired time table notification to open the PDF.
Download and save the file on your device.
Print a copy and mark your exam dates for better preparation.

content.text: Students should carefully check the official timetable according to their programme, semester, and admission year.
Go to Official Time Table Page

links.text: Go to Official Time Table Page

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Calicut University Time Table 2026

content.text: The official Calicut University Time Table 2026 notifications contain all essential details required for the April 2026 examinations.

items: Exact examination dates and day-wise schedule
Programme name and semester details
Admission years and scheme (2021-2023 etc.)
Supplementary and Improvement exam information
Exam timing and important instructions
Applicability for University Teaching Departments.
